name: Accordion Item
description: A collapsible title and rich-text body intended for the SFNext Toolkit Accordion.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Accordion Item
attribute_definition_groups.description: A collapsible title and rich-text body intended for the SFNext Toolkit Accordion.

attribute_definitions.name: Title
attribute_definitions.description: Question or section title shown in the accordion trigger.

attribute_definitions.name: Content
attribute_definitions.description: Rich-text content revealed when the item is opened.

attribute_definitions.name: Content style
attribute_definitions.description: Selects a safe presentation for normal text, a bullet list, or a two-column table.

attribute_definitions.name: Open by default
attribute_definitions.description: Displays this item expanded when the page first loads.
